turns.user_message: I tried to cheer myself up, but it just made me feel worse. I don't even know why I bother.
Every time I try to feel okay, it backfires and I end up feeling guilty. It's like my own attempts to feel better are the problem.
I'm starting to think my presence is toxic because even trying to fix my own mood ruins things. I should just stop trying to feel anything at all.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better.
